cross_scene_arcs.title: Hired for Extraction
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Georgia Sykes is hired to extract Buddy Israel, prepares with violence constraints, and affirms her platonic partnership with Sharice Watters.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Hired for extraction mission with clarified objectives.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Armed and ready to proceed with set rules and partner coordination.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Discovery of Impostors
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Sykes is shocked by a violent elevator scene and discovers that the men involved are impostors with fake FBI IDs, disarming one.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Stuпefied by the carnage in the elevator.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: In possession of fake IDs and having disarmed Acosta.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: How to proceed with the impostors and the discovered evidence.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Wounded in Action
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Sykes coordinates with Messner for fire support but is shot by Acosta, suffering partial paralysis and losing communication.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Actively coordinating tactical support via IFB.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Wounded, partially paralyzed, and communication severed.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Whether she will survive or be captured.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Rescue and Bonding with Ivy
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Sykes confronts Darwin, rescues injured Ivy, and escapes the penthouse, deepening their bond during the descent.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: In a tense standoff with Darwin.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Descending stairs with Ivy, relationship strengthened through shared ordeal.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Ivy's gunshot injury requires urgent medical attention.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Heart Extraction Plot
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Israel is targeted for his heart in a kidnapping plot, a contract is confirmed, he evades capture as a fugitive, and ends up hospitalized where he is revealed to be the son of his enemy.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Target of a kidnapping and heart extraction plot.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: In hospital, barely conscious, with the heart transplant plot looming.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Whether the heart transplant will proceed and Israel's survival.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Informant Betrayal and Violence
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Israel betrays his mob mentor to become a federal informant, cooperates with authorities by betraying associates, leading to a violent confrontation with Ivy.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Negotiating with FBI for immunity after betraying Sparazza.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Has agreed to cooperate with Feds and betrays Ivy, then attacks Ivy, resulting in gunfire.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Ivy's knowledge of the betrayal and the outcome of the violent conflict.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Cardiac Health Decline
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Israel's cocaine use leads to severe cardiac distress and a collapse during a confrontation, incapacitating him.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Diagnosed with imminent risk of massive coronary due to cocaine use.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Collapsed from heart issue, incapacitated on the ground.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Immediate medical emergency and need for intervention.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Uncovering the Heller Betrayal
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Messner questions Heller's allegiance, discovers hidden FBI files on Sparazza, and learns the Bureau's betrayal, leading him to kill Sparazza and abandon his FBI career.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Skeptical agent in debriefing with Locke
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Agent who has killed Sparazza and discarded his FBI ID
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Consequences of killing Sparazza and his future outside the FBI

cross_scene_arcs.title: Partnership and Loss with Carruthers
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Messner coordinates with Carruthers on the investigation, fears for his safety during an imposter incident, attempts to save him when wounded, and grieves his death.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Professional partners managing a crime scene
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Emotional impact on Messner and how it affects his actions

cross_scene_arcs.title: Defiance Against Authority
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Messner challenges Locke's explanations, confronts him over operational indifference, and breaks with the FBI by killing Sparazza and leaving the Bureau.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Defiant agent who has severed ties with the FBI
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Potential repercussions from the FBI or personal fallout

cross_scene_arcs.title: Extraction Mission to Tahoe
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Messner is assigned to extract Buddy Israel, manages the Lake Tahoe crime scene, uncovers links to missing persons, and ends up driving an injured victim to Las Vegas.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Agent on extraction team preparing for deployment
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Agent assisting Elmore to Las Vegas, showing compassion
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The drive to Las Vegas and the ongoing investigation

cross_scene_arcs.title: Crisis Response and Tactical Retreat
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Messner orders a tactical team for Carruthers' safety, advances under fire to extract him, and later disengages from a standoff with Sykes and Ivy.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Agent commanding crisis response at the Nomad
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Agent choosing tactical retreat over confrontation
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Fate of Sykes and Ivy after the disengagement
